column7: Typo – Please note that this OCR error is quite common. Therefore, I am suggesting a Global Correction that will save US BOTH time and effort. The correction would isolate the word with a "preceding" and "following" Blank Space as: " cake " —> " cakre "  •  Andhrabharati has stated that you are able to "target" only Sanskrit so that English Words are excluded and left out of this domain of correction. I undersand that there could be a Small Amount of "Crossfire", but is would still save time to Make this Global Correction; And Then Simply "Reverse" any casualties to their original state.
